scripts.build: dotenv -e ../../.env -- bunx prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && tsc
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e ../../.env -- bunx prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:deploy: dotenv -e ../../.env -- bunx prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: dotenv -e ../../.env -- bunx prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reconcile: dotenv -e ../../.env -- bunx prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:prepare-cutover: bun run db:flat-migrate && bun run db:deploy && bun run db:reconcile && bun run db:seed:prod && bun run db:init-membership
scripts.db:seed: bun run build && dotenv -e ../../.env -- bun run prisma/seed.ts
